message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive audit E2E integration tests (bd-37v0)

24 tests covering all workstream audit fixes:
- Performance budget verification (p99 latency for classify_command)
- WS2 zero-allocation reject path (Cow::Borrowed verification)
- WS4 multi-command classification correctness
- Fail-open verification (malformed/unicode/edge-case input)
- Classification correctness (compilation vs non-compilation)
- Serde roundtrip for Classification and ClassificationDetails

Also fixes clippy::ptr_arg lint on assert_cow_borrowed helper in
patterns.rs tests (needs &Cow to inspect variant, not &str).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
